'''zhakungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:deaconry|deaconry]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-k-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deaconry|deaconry]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhakungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhækingith|zhækingith]] || [[word:zhækingij|zhækingij]] || [[word:zhækingish|zhækingish]] || [[word:zhækingi|zhækingi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhakukunguth|zhakukunguth]] || [[word:zhakukunguj|zhakukunguj]] || [[word:zhakukungush|zhakukungush]] || [[word:zhakukungu|zhakukungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhakunguth|zhakunguth]] || [[word:zhakunguj|zhakunguj]] || [[word:zhakungush|zhakungush]] || [[word:zhakungu|zhakungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhakufnguth|zhakufnguth]] || [[word:zhakufnguj|zhakufnguj]] || [[word:zhakufngush|zhakufngush]] || [[word:zhakufnguf|zhakufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhakunguthu|zhakunguthu]] || [[word:zhakunguju|zhakunguju]] || [[word:zhakungushu|zhakungushu]] || [[word:zhakunguku|zhakunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhakunguth|zhakunguth]] || [[word:zhakunguj|zhakunguj]] || [[word:zhakungush|zhakungush]] || [[word:zhakungu|zhakungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhakunguthul|zhakunguthul]] || [[word:zhakungujul|zhakungujul]] || [[word:zhakungushul|zhakungushul]] || [[word:zhakungukul|zhakungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhakunguthuthu|zhakunguthuthu]] || [[word:zhakungujuju|zhakungujuju]] || [[word:zhakungushushu|zhakungushushu]] || [[word:zhakunguku|zhakunguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhakunguthun|zhakunguthun]] || [[word:zhakungujun|zhakungujun]] || [[word:zhakungushun|zhakungushun]] || [[word:zhakungukun|zhakungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhakunguthuoro|zhakunguthuoro]] || [[word:zhakungujuoro|zhakungujuoro]] || [[word:zhakungushuoro|zhakungushuoro]] || [[word:zhakungukuoro|zhakungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
